mapper.select: SELECT * FROM thamgiaduan WHERE ma_nv = #{maNv} AND ma_da = #{maDa} AND thang = #{thang} AND nam = #{nam}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO thamgiaduan (ma_nv, ma_da, thang, nam, so_gio_lam_viec, ghi_chu) VALUES (#{maNv}, #{maDa}, #{thang}, #{nam}, #{soGioLamViec}, #{ghiChu})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM thamgiaduan WHERE ma_nv = #{maNv} AND ma_da = #{maDa} AND thang = #{thang} AND nam = #{nam}
